candidate.objective: Dedicated Civil Operator and Trade Assistant with extensive experience in heavy equipment operation across mining, civil, and pipeline construction environments. Evan has demonstrated proficiency operating Excavators, Posi-Tracks, Loaders, and Rollers across multiple projects including the Onslow Iron Project, Western Ranges pipeline works, and labour hire operations. A committed safety professional with a strong track record in culvert installation, stormwater works, pipe laying, and earthworks. Holds a current Dogging HRWL, Apprenticeship in Mechanical Automation and Maintenance Fitting, and plant tickets across excavator, skid steer, roller, front end loader, and integrated tool carrier. Rio Tinto site inducted.

duties: Undertook a diverse range of responsibilities with a strong emphasis on integrated tool carrier management and the operation of PoziTrack machinery.
Performed meticulous site clean-up, proficient loading and unloading of road trains using excavators, and precise material loading into moxies.
Conducted expert backfill operations using PoziTrack machinery.
Ensured seamless progression of project tasks and contributed significantly to the project's overall efficiency and success.
Conducted excavator operations including precise levelling of roads and pads.
Operated PoziTrack machinery for pad rolling and material backfilling.
Executed pipe laying tasks with precision, contributing to successful pipeline project completion.
Operated excavators, posi-tracks, and loaders to carry out diverse project tasks.
Completed culvert and stormwater installations in strict adherence to project specifications and quality standards.
Set up levels for precision work and conducted excavation work for drainage systems.
Managed PoziTrack operations and loaded out materials for the project.
Rolled pads and roads to ensure a smooth working surface.
Participated in the installation of steel and concrete culverts.
Completed installation and maintenance of below-ground drainage systems including culverts, sewage, and stormwater infrastructure.
Maintained a safe workplace and adhered to all site safety requirements throughout project delivery.

skills.detail: Proficient operator of Excavators, PoziTrack/Posi-Tracks, Loaders, Rollers, and Integrated Tool Carriers. Experienced in load and haul, backfilling, road and pad levelling, and material loading.
Experienced in below-ground pipe laying, culvert installation, stormwater installation, drainage systems, and earthworks across mining and civil construction environments.
Strong commitment to workplace health and safety with consistent adherence to all site safety requirements across mining and civil project environments.
Background in mechanical automation and maintenance fitting through apprenticeship training, providing strong technical awareness for equipment care and fault identification.

certifications.details: Certified to conduct civil construction excavator operations.
Certified to conduct civil construction skid steer loader operations.
Certified to conduct integrated tool carrier operations.
Certified to conduct civil construction front end loader operations.
High Risk Work Licence — Dogging, licence to perform dogging operations.

certifications.ticket: Apprenticeship — Mechanical Automation and Maintenance Fitting
certifications.details: Apprenticeship in Mechanical Automation and Maintenance Fitting.
Western Australia C Class drivers licence.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
